current_scorecard.title: Effective Personalized AI Tutors via LLM-Guided Reinforcement Learning
current_scorecard.authors_full: Chung, Zhang, Kung, H. Bastani, O. Bastani
current_scorecard.setting_detail: Taiwan, high school (10 schools, 8 public + 2 private)
current_scorecard.ai_tool: GenAI chatbot tutor (LLM-based, with guardrails); GPT-4o for problem generation

estimates.study_label: Chung et al., Standardized in-person final Python cert
estimates.treatment: Personalized problem sequencing (POMDP-based RL adaptive algorithm) + GenAI chatbot tutor
estimates.control: Fixed problem sequence (easy-to-hard) + same GenAI chatbot tutor
estimates.outcome: Standardized in-person final Python certification exam (no AI/devices allowed)
